latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: The generated drawing still differs visibly from the same-name reference drawing in layout, dimension style, and sheet treatment.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: The generated front/top/projected view placement and ink distribution do not match the learned reference layout.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: The generated drawing exposes only 11 real DisplayDim against the 12-Dim reference floor, and lifecycle evidence shows missing post-layout reference-intent targets.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Dimension text is clustered and dense around the generated views, especially near the main view and right-side projected view.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.title_block: The generated sheet still shows non-reference title block/template artifacts and does not match the compact reference treatment.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Manufacturing notes and surface/technical annotations are visibly inconsistent with the reference and remain incomplete for release.

latest_manual_findings: The generated 006 output is fresh from run drw_output/runs/bfe950d72fc7, but it is not visually acceptable.
The generated drawing does not match the same-name reference layout and view distribution.
Dimension placement remains non-reference-like, clustered, and difficult to read.
The generated drawing has 11 real DisplayDim where the 006 reference requires at least 12, and post-layout target coverage is missing.
Title block/template treatment and manufacturing notes remain visibly different from the reference.

correction_actions.source_note: The generated drawing still differs visibly from the same-name reference drawing in layout, dimension style, and sheet treatment.
correction_actions.correction_action: Match the same-name SLDDRW reference composition before considering API metrics sufficient.

correction_actions.source_note: The generated front/top/projected view placement and ink distribution do not match the learned reference layout.
correction_actions.correction_action: Use the learned normalized layout slots and avoid default title-block-driven sheet placement.

correction_actions.source_note: The generated drawing exposes only 11 real DisplayDim against the 12-Dim reference floor, and lifecycle evidence shows missing post-layout reference-intent targets.
correction_actions.correction_action: Create explicit reference-intent SolidWorks DisplayDim objects for visible manufacturing callouts.

correction_actions.source_note: Dimension text is clustered and dense around the generated views, especially near the main view and right-side projected view.
correction_actions.correction_action: Arrange dimensions into readable lanes and reject overlap or sparse generic AutoDimension output.

correction_actions.source_note: The generated sheet still shows non-reference title block/template artifacts and does not match the compact reference treatment.
correction_actions.correction_action: Remove or suppress the oversized default title block/frame when it conflicts with the reference layout.

correction_actions.source_note: Manufacturing notes and surface/technical annotations are visibly inconsistent with the reference and remain incomplete for release.
correction_actions.correction_action: Preserve reference-style notes, roughness, warning text, and compact callout regions.

current_006_ui_verdict.latest_manual_required_correction: Revise 006 generation to create explicit reference-intent SolidWorks DisplayDim targets, preserve them through post-layout final export, remove reference-forbidden template artifacts, then rerun exactly one locked 006 CAD cycle and repeat Drawing Review UI screenshot judgement.
